examples: She has just given him a good scolding right to his face.
Parents shouldn't keep scolding their child for his unintentional mistakes.
My yelling and scolding didn't have much effect, but the swinging coat did.
But the Northern Ireland full-back shrugged off his scolding to help put Cardiff into the lead.
Bary advised that usually a stern scolding was all that was required to correct her daughter.
